title: Grip is unreal
review_text: Ran a muddy 25K trail race in these. Never slipped once. Toe bumper saved me on a rocky descent. Best trail shoe I've owned.

title: Solid but heavy
review_text: Coming from road shoes these feel like tanks. Great protection and grip but I notice the weight on longer runs. Perfect for technical terrain though.

title: New England trail essential
review_text: Rocky roots, wet granite, loose gravel — these handle everything. Gusseted tongue keeps pebbles out. 200 miles in and outsole looks new.
